overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk along a futuristic dystopian city sidewalk beneath an elevated monorail highway. The scene features vibrant neon signage, passing vehicles, and two NPCs running past the player character in a high-density cyberpunk urban environment with a mix of natural and artificial lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated transit line

events.description: two pedestrians run past the camera from the front, moving in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the elevated highway, approaching two characters running toward the camera

notable_agents.action: two characters running toward the camera - one in red tactical armor with helmet, one in gray jacket - passing closely on the right side

entered.detail: massive concrete and metal highway or monorail track running overhead with visible support beams
commercial building with distinctive pink stucco facade and reflective glass storefront windows
large green neon sign spelling HOTEL mounted on the right side building facade
tall futuristic skyscraper with purple reflective glass and construction cranes visible at the top
multi-lane asphalt road with vehicles passing by including a white delivery truck

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a concrete sidewalk beneath an elevated highway structure. The environment features a distinctive pink building on the left with glass storefronts, and a green neon hotel sign visible on the right. Two NPCs - one in red tactical gear and one in casual clothing - run toward the camera from the distance and pass closely by on the right side around the 6-second mark, while vehicles pass on the multi-lane road to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with vending machines and graffiti-covered storefronts

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk steadily past the hotel entrance and along the storefronts

entered.detail: bright red automated vending machine with glowing yellow interface lights
storefront windows covered in colorful green and pink graffiti tags and street art
low-rise commercial building with blue facade on the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The walk continues along the covered sidewalk, moving past the green neon hotel sign which falls behind the camera. The pink building on the left recedes into the distance while new elements appear including a red vending machine and storefront windows covered in vibrant graffiti. The elevated monorail structure remains overhead throughout, and sparse vehicle traffic continues on the right. The environment maintains its cyberpunk aesthetic with mixed natural and neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a dystopian city sidewalk that shifts from a view of bright storefronts to a more gritty, graffiti-covered urban corridor. It begins beneath an elevated highway structure, moving past a distinctive pink building on the left and a green neon hotel sign on the right. As the camera advances, two NPCs in tactical and casual gear run from the distance and pass closely by on the right, while vehicles stream along the adjacent multi-lane road. The scene then shifts as the hotel sign recedes behind the camera and the pink building fades, giving way to a red vending machine and storefront windows layered in vibrant graffiti. The movement concludes under the persistent shadow of the monorail structure, maintaining a cyberpunk atmosphere of mixed natural and neon lighting.
